Operational Excellence In An AI Arms Race This move into the top 10% of stocks for operational efficiency comes as the company demonstrates superior free cash flow (FCF) resilience compared to its “Big 5” hyperscaler peers, even as technical indicators show persistent short- and long-term price trend challenges.
